nasb.text: Now the rest of the acts of Zimri and his conspiracy which he carried out, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

esv.text: Now the rest of the acts of Zimri, and the conspiracy that he made, are they not written in the Book of the Chronicles of the Kings of Israel?

cnv.text: 心利其餘的事蹟和他密謀背叛的事，不是都記在以色列諸王的年代誌上嗎？

ccb.text: 心利其他的事及其谋反篡位的经过，都记在以色列的列王史上。
